purpose: Single reference view combining seed + create payload + UI/UX behavior contract.

sharedSchema.title: Internet Experience Questionnaire
sharedSchema.description: Survey to understand internet usage, performance, and future demand.
sharedSchema.thankYouMessage: Thank you for sharing your internet experience!

questions.title: What is your location within Westlands?
What type is your premises?
What is your role in internet or IT-related decisions?
Who is your Internet Service Provider (ISP)?
Approximately how many people regularly use the internet connection at this premises?
Which types of devices are regularly connected? (Select all that apply)
options: Smart home / IoT devices (CCTV, sensors, etc)

questions.title: Type of internet connection used (Select all that apply)
Subscribed or estimated bandwidth capacity
Peak usage periods (Select all that apply)
Compared to two years ago, your internet usage is:
How often do internet disruptions affect your activities?
Which issue makes internet performance unacceptable for you? (Select all that apply)
How much performance variation can you tolerate during peak hours?
How do you perceive your current internet cost?
What would you justify paying more for? (Select up to 3)
If forced to choose, which do you prioritize most?
Approximately how much do you currently pay per month for internet connectivity
What is the size of your organization?
What best describes the building's internet setup?
options: One shared connection for the entire building
Combination of shared and individual connections

questions.title: Who is responsible for choosing the internet provider for the building?
What is the biggest internet-related challenge in your building?
How willing would residents be to adopt a managed building-wide internet solution?
Which value-added services would be attractive in a building-wide package? (Select up to 2)
How reliable is your current internet connection at home?
Which factor most influences your choice of internet provider?
Which household activity consumes the most bandwidth?
How likely are you to upgrade your internet plan in the next 12 months? (1 = Very Unlikely, 5 = Very Likely)
Would you consider a bundled home package (internet + TV + cloud storage + security + smart home solutions)?
How critical is internet availability to daily business operations?
Does your organization have redundance or backup connectivity?
options: Partial redundancy (e.g. Mobile Failover, Secondary Fibre)

questions.title: Which issue poses the highest business risk?
Who is responsible for IT and connectivity decisions?
What infrastructure improvement would most benefit your business?
How do you expect your internet and digital service needs to change in the next 2-3 years?
How confident are you that your current provider can meet future demand? (1 = Not Confident, 5 = Very Confident)
Would AI-driven insights (usage forecasts, proactive fault detection) influence your choice of provider?
In one or two sentences, describe what the biggest limitation of your current internet or digital services is?
What is the biggest challenge you face with your Internet Service Provider (ISP)?
Overall, how satisfied are you with your current Internet Service Provider? (1= Very dissatisfied, 5 = Very satisfied)

rules.valueContains: Smart home / IoT devices (CCTV, sensors, etc)

branching.behavior: Premises type selects one branch section (mdus/sdus/enterprise) then continues to shared sections.

conditionalVisibility.rule: show when selected answers include "Smart home / IoT devices (CCTV, sensors, etc)"

behavior: Disable further selections when maxSelections is reached.
If option "None" exists, it is exclusive and cannot be combined with other options.
If "Other" is selected, companion text is required where allowOther=true.
Applies survey theme color to focus/highlight state when themeColor is set.
